title: 26 Weeks
excerpt: Due date is still September 15 and I am actually 27 weeks along, just closing out the 2nd trimester. But Ann-Marie came over last week and snapped some photos. This pregnancy is moving right along and so am I. Although…
body:
Due date is still September 15 and I am actually 27 weeks along, just closing out the 2nd trimester. But Ann-Marie came over last week and snapped some photos. This pregnancy is moving right along and so am I. Although my jumping days are on hold for a little while, turns out pretending to skip is pretty fun too.

Photos and gif by Ann-Marie Morris

Old Navy pocket tee | Be Maternity cami from Target | H&M Mama skinny jeans | flip flops by Havianas
